phrases.intent_en: How do I find the cafe?
phrases.cultural_note: The park has seasonal snack vendors; a more permanent cafe is often found near the playground area.

likely_response.translation_en: Right behind the playground, on the right.

responses.english: Right behind the playground, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Are dogs allowed off leash here?
phrases.text_local: Mohou tu psi běhat na volno?
phrases.cultural_note: City police patrol the park and may fine owners for unleashed dogs outside designated areas.

likely_response.local: Ne, jen na vodítku ve vyznačených zónách.
likely_response.translation_en: No, only on a leash in marked zones.

responses.english: No, only on a leash in marked zones.
responses.french: Ne, jen na vodítku ve vyznačených zónách.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Personification of Tolerance?
phrases.cultural_note: The statue is a well-known local landmark within the park's open area.

likely_response.translation_en: In the middle of the big meadow, opposite the gazebo.

responses.english: In the middle of the big meadow, opposite the gazebo.

phrases.intent_en: Is the seasonal event ticket booth open?
phrases.text_local: Je otevřená pokladna na sezónní akce?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket booths typically operate only during major park festivals or weekend events.

likely_response.local: Dnes ne, otevřeno je jen o víkendech.
likely_response.translation_en: Not today, it's only open on weekends.

responses.english: Not today, it's only open on weekends.
responses.french: Dnes ne, otevřeno je jen o víkendech.
